sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10137" key="a)ntime/qecis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιμέθεξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10137.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reciprocal participation,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inPh.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg001:101" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">101</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg001:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
